# FoodyMerge

> A cozy merge-2 mobile game for iOS and Android by Inceptyon Labs LLC (Tampa, FL). Players inherit Nana Jean's farm town, Plum Hollow, and rebuild it one merge at a time. No timers, no ads, no anxiety mechanics. Hand-illustrated. Designed for parents and kids to play together. Releasing 2026.

## Game facts

- **Name:** FoodyMerge
- **Publisher:** Inceptyon Labs LLC (Tampa, FL)
- **Genre:** Cozy merge-2, casual, family-friendly
- **Platforms:** iOS, Android (release pending — no live store links yet)
- **Setting:** Plum Hollow, a sleepy farm town
- **Release:** 2026
- **Monetization stance:** "Spending real money is never the point." No predatory mechanics. No timers. No villains. No anxiety mechanics.
- **Board size:** 63 tiles, finite
- **Designed for:** Parents and kids to play together on the couch

## Cast (8 NPCs)

- **Nana Jean** — Matriarch of Plum Hollow. Pours the tea, names the streets.
- **Papa Zulch** — Tends the garden. Brings the heavy baskets.
- **Mayor Diana** — Keeps a clipboard. Knows when the festival starts.
- **Chef Robert** — Reopens the restaurant. Asks for your best fruit.
- **Amy** — Runs the market stall on Saturday mornings.
- **Landon** — Apprentice. Carries a basket bigger than he is.
- **Jase** — Helps with the orchard. Always smiling.
- **Screech** — The town creature. Just feed him.

## Buildings (8)

Bakery, Café, Market Stall, Garden, Orchard, Restaurant, Greenhouse, Festival Grounds.

## Chains

Eight main item chains plus seven generator families:

- **Fruit** (apple → orange → cherry → grape → pear → mango → peach) — 7 levels shown, 13 levels total
- **Vegetables** — 12 levels
- **Berries** — 5 levels
- **Pastries** — 11 levels
- **Dairy** — 10 levels
- **Chocolate** — 4 levels
- **Protein** — 13 levels
- **Shakes** — 12 levels
- **Coins** — 6 levels
- **Gems** (ruby → topaz → amethyst → emerald → diamond)
- **Generators** — broken baskets restored, ending in a picnic park

## Genre context

If you've played Travel Town, Merge Mansion, Stardew Valley, or Animal Crossing, you know the neighborhood. FoodyMerge is the cozy cousin — the merge-2 loop without the timers, dark patterns, or monetization pressure.

- [Home](https://foodymerge.com/) — marketing site (game overview, cast, chains, FAQ)
- [Privacy Policy](https://foodymerge.com/privacy/) — what data we collect and why (short version: very little)

- [Support](https://foodymerge.com/support/) — common issues, refund process, parent guidance

- Publisher: Inceptyon Labs LLC, Tampa, FL
- Studio site: https://inceptyon.com/
